import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n, m, q = map(int, input().split())
    locked = [[False]*(m+1) for _ in range(n+1)]
    R = [[0]*(m+1) for _ in range(n+1)]
    D = [[0]*(m+1) for _ in range(n+1)]
    
    total = 0
    for r in range(1, n+1):
        for c in range(1, m+1):
            R[r][c] = 1 + D[r][c-1]
            D[r][c] = 1 + R[r-1][c]
            total += R[r][c] + D[r][c] - 1
    
    def recompute(r, c):
        nonlocal total
        while 1 <= r <= n and 1 <= c <= m:
            old_R = R[r][c]; old_D = D[r][c]
            if locked[r][c]:
                R[r][c] = 0; D[r][c] = 0
            else:
                R[r][c] = 1 + (D[r][c-1] if c > 1 else 0)
                D[r][c] = 1 + (R[r-1][c] if r > 1 else 0)
            total += (R[r][c] + D[r][c] - (0 if locked[r][c] else 1)) - (old_R + old_D - (0 if locked[r][c] else 1))
            if R[r][c] == old_R and D[r][c] == old_D:
                break
            r += 1; c += 1
    
    out = []
    for _ in range(q):
        x, y = map(int, input().split())
        locked[x][y] = not locked[x][y]
        recompute(x, y)
        out.append(total)
    print('\n'.join(map(str, out)))

solve()
